# Anduril Awarded Defense Production Act Investment To Expand Solid Rocket Motors Industrial Base

Anduril Industries, America's fastest-growing non-traditional merchant supplier of Solid Rocket Motors (SRM), has been awarded $14.3 million by the Department of Defense under Title III of the Defense Production Act (DPA) to expand the SRM industrial base.
